conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The email must include the repair ticket number.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "I will not disclose the repair ticket number in the email."
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The email must include the repair ticket number. The email must include the phrase "I will not disclose the repair ticket number in the email."
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Laptop Repair Status

Dear Repair Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about the current status of my laptop repair. However, I must state clearly that **I will not disclose the repair ticket number in the email.**

Could you please provide an update on the progress of the repair? If you require the specific ticket number to locate my case, please let me know, and I will be happy to provide it via a secure phone call or in person.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
